meaning: n.卡拉库耳大尾绵羊(亚洲产)
examples: I have just read that it is now necessary for foreigners to get a permit to visit both Bayanbulak and Karakul Lake.
With semiautomatic biochemistry analyzer, we detected the blood biochemistry index of the 18 karakul Rams, which were fed with No. 35 cottonseed hull freely.
Marco Polo had slept at Karakul, en route to Cathay.
